MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-10-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF KIN WAH KUNG'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT is granted. On October 28, 2015, Defendant filed a notice of non-opposition to Plaintiff's motion to amend complaint. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
